missions.title: Electromagnetic Induction and Alternating Currents - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering magnetic flux, Faraday law, Lenz law and more.

microtargets.title: Magnetic flux
mustKnowFacts: Magnetic flux is a fundamental subtopic of Electromagnetic Induction and Alternating Currents.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Magnetic flux for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Magnetic flux during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Magnetic flux.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Magnetic flux.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Magnetic flux.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Magnetic flux.
What is a common trap associated with Magnetic flux?
